message: Your account has been blocked. To restore access, kindly call the number displayed and verify your details.
Dear customer, your momo wallet has been suspended due to suspicious login. Call now to unlock it.
You have received GH¢2,750 mistakenly. Please send back the amount immediately before reversal fee is applied.
MTN Alert: Your line will be disconnected tonight. Reply with your OTP to confirm ownership.
Brother, I dey Ghana Post. Your parcel is here but tax must be settled today. Send the fee so we release am.
Your bank account is blocked. To avoid permanent freeze, send your card details and OTP now.
Your MoMo reversal has been approved. Kindly confirm by sending the code to our officer.
Congrats! Your number won a reward. Pay GH¢45 processing fee to receive it today.
Account blocked due to invalid login attempt. Please visit the link we sent to verify your wallet.
Momo department: urgent! Your KYC is incomplete. Reply with your full name and OTP before 5pm.
Ei boss, your package no reach. Sender said duty not paid. Send small money make we release am.
Your transaction of GH¢1,200 is pending. If not yours, call this number immediately to cancel.
Hello dear, we have blocked your wallet for security. Send your PIN so we unblock it for you.
You are selected for a business grant. Pay a registration fee to activate your payment today.
We detected unusual activity on your card. Reply with the OTP and expiry date to keep account active.
Your number has been shortlisted. Please send GH¢30 for confirmation and prize delivery.
Please confirm your address and send the one-time code. Courier team cannot proceed without it.
Your wallet is blocked. To avoid charges, call us now. Do not ignore this message.
Hi sis, I sent you money by mistake. Please return it asap before my bank report the case.
Your airtime bundle has been activated successfully. Thank you for using our service.
Your data bundle purchase was successful. No action required.
Charlie, I dey town. Call me when free, we need talk about project.
Account locked. We noticed unusual transfer. Contact support to stop further deductions.
Your ATM card will expire today. Kindly verify your account now using the link below.
Hello, this is the reversal desk. Your refund is ready but we need the code from your SMS to process it.
Your loan application is approved. Pay the admin fee now to receive the funds in 10 minutes.
Dear customer, kindly reconfirm your details. Failure to respond will block your account permanently.
Appointment reminder: Your clinic visit is scheduled for tomorrow at 9:00 AM.
You coming to chapel later? Bring the charger abeg.
Final notice: account suspended. To prevent further loss, reply with the 6-digit code sent to you.
